title: Gerascanthus scabrifolius
taxonomy: Gerascanthus scabrifolius is classified within the family Apocynaceae, a group of flowering plants commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This family is part of the order Gentianales, which includes other flowering plants such as gentians, loganias, and oleanders. The order Gentianales is further classified within the clade Asterids, one of the two major groups of flowering plants. The clade Asterids is then grouped within the larger clade Angiosperms, which encompasses all flowering plants. The classification of Gerascanthus scabrifolius reflects its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants.
